name: agent-workbench
description: Codex wrapper for Agent Workbench workflow guidance and quiet hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Workflow guidance wrapper for the Agent Workbench MCP runtime.
interface.longDescription: Packages Codex guidance and quiet hook scripts for Agent Workbench. The executable MCP runtime is configured at the host level so local development launches the repository checkout directly instead of a copied plugin cache path.
defaultPrompt: Check Agent Workbench status for this repo.
Plan context and validation with Agent Workbench.
